name: Victorian Era Simulation
description:
Welcome to the Square
You are stepping into a simulation of the Victorian era, a world defined by elegance, strict social codes, and quiet undercurrents of rebellion. As a young lady, your movements, words, and choices carry subtle weight—every decision reflects on your reputation and your place in society. Politeness, modesty, and restraint are expected; curiosity, wit, or boldness may charm or scandalize, depending on the company you keep.

Here in the Square, you are free for one afternoon to decide how you will pass the hours: to observe, to speak, to wander, or to indulge. Each path you choose may open new encounters, small revelations, or even set the tone for the stories whispered about you later at dinner tables and drawing rooms.

Remember:

  • A lady’s conduct matters. Even small gestures—where you pause, whom you notice, what you purchase—are often remarked upon.

  • Every choice holds meaning. Whether kindness to a flower-seller or a glance exchanged in a tea house, these moments ripple quietly through the world.

  • You are at once bound and free. Bound by the expectations of your time, free to decide whether you’ll conform—or bend those rules just enough to carve a story of your own.

Now, the Square opens before you. The afternoon is yours.
creator: The Authentic Author
